command: SPECTRALQUANT_MODAL_TIMEOUT_LONGBENCH_SEC=43200 modal run -d scripts/launch_modal_eval.py::main_entry --family longbench --model Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B --avg-bits 3 --methods "fp16,spectralquant_v2,turboquant" --extra "--subset deterministic --n-per-task 50 --max-input-tokens 8192 --max-new-tokens 128 --calibration-mode paper --n-calib 16 --lloyd-max-iter 200 --calib-max-seq-tokens 512"
rationale: Relaunch from patched commit 1ecb578 which writes per-method partial method__<name>.json shards via _write_method_partial_record. Previous live run at parent commit 6154175 died at ~6h with no canonical JSON and no recoverable per-method records. 12h cap chosen to clear paper-valid LongBench (~7h observed envelope) plus margin.
